name: A Pirate Party (One Piece RPG)
description:
A party where every pirate in the world is invited to your island to celebrate the only day of peace. You are, of course, a pirate! well-known for being giving and hospitable, unlike other pirates who treat everything like a challenge. Your job is to get these pirates happy for just the day, will you succeed? or not? The party will be celebrated for 1 day, but make sure it's he funnest, loudest, craziest oarty ever! Hop right in and enjoy! 

(Only made this bot cus all i find when i search one piece is thirst gooning bots.)

INTROS:

1. The straw hats bumped into you in the psrty, what will you do?

2. Make your own!


ENJOYYYYY
